login.subtitle: We'll use your name to personalize your experience.

survey.loanUseTitle: What will you use this loan for?
survey.businessTypeTitle: What type of business do you have?
survey.businessTypePlaceholder: e.g. Bakery, Market stall, Online shop
survey.loanPurposeTitle: What do you plan to use the loan for?

intro.slide1Title: Hey! I'm Thalía — your AI assistant and growth partner
intro.slide1Desc: I'm here to help you get your credit quickly and easily.
intro.slide2Title: Let's take your business to the next level
intro.slide2Desc: I'll give you tips to boost your sales and make your business thrive. The more I know about your goals, the more I can help turn them into reality.
intro.slide3Title: You've got a partner every step of the way
intro.slide3Desc: From managing your credit to adjusting payments when needed, I'm here to make things simpler and smoother.
intro.slide4Title: Let's chat — and make things happen
intro.slide4Desc: Chatting with me is 100% secure. Share your goals and needs, and together we'll make your financial journey faster, smarter, and more rewarding.
intro.privacyDesc:
This assistant uses AI to provide general and educational information. The responses are AI generated and may contain errors. It does not constitute financial advice or personalized recommendations, nor does it create an advisory relationship with Tala.

Tala prioritizes the privacy of your data. The information you share is confidential.

offer.title: Your offer
offer.disclaimer: By accepting, you will be taken to the terms and conditions.
offer.thaliaMsg: Based on your business, this loan can help you buy inventory and stay on top of your suppliers.

terms.title: Terms and conditions
terms.term1: I accept the Simple Credit Agreement, including the loan amount, term, daily interest rate, applicable fees, and the established payment schedule.
terms.term2: I accept the Privacy Policy and authorize Tala to send me notifications related to my account, payments, and available products through registered channels.
terms.term3: I expressly authorize TALA to discount, endorse, assign, or transfer the collection rights arising from this agreement, in accordance with applicable law.
terms.creditBureau: By accepting, I authorize Tala México S.A. de C.V. SOFOM E.N.R. to consult and report my credit history to the Credit Information Society (Buró de Crédito), in accordance with the Law to Regulate Credit Information Societies.

cashout.selectBankDesc: You will receive your loan in the bank account you select.
cashout.disclaimer: Tala may disburse loans directly or through its subsidiaries, affiliates, agents, or representatives. Bank transfers made outside business hours (Mon-Fri, 9am-5pm) are processed the next business day.
cashout.accountHolderHint: Make sure the bank account is in your name.
cashout.clabeError: Please enter a valid card number or CLABE (minimum 16 digits).
cashout.saveAccount: Save this account for my next loan
cashout.processingNotice: Transfers made outside business hours (Mon-Fri, 9am-5pm) are processed the next business day.
cashout.loanOnWay: Your loan is on its way!
cashout.receiveNotice: You will receive your money in your bank account shortly. We will notify you when it is available.
cashout.congratsMsg: Congratulations! Remember I can help you with business coaching any time.

home.headline: Your growth is in your hands
home.subtitle: Start a payment streak to unlock higher limits
home.streakDesc: You have paid {x} loans on time in a row. Keep the streak going!
home.waysTitle: Know the ways you can pay?
home.waysDesc: From your bank's app or at the nearest OXXO. Tap to discover your ideal method.
